hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if ! echo "$INPUT" | grep -q '"python3 '; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$INPUT" | grep -q 'python3 -m venv'; then exit 0; fi; echo 'Use .venv/bin/python, not bare python3.' >&2; exit 2

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path": *"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$FILE" in */docs/*|*/LLMud/*|*CLAUDE.md) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; RELATED=$(head -5 "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -i '^Related:'); if [ -n "$RELATED" ]; then echo "DOC SYNC REMINDER: $RELATED -- check if your change requires updates to those files."; fi; exit 0
echo 'REMINDER: WSL2 environment. Use fuser -k (not pkill). Use .venv/bin/python (not python3). Temporal captures always need generate_output: false. Skills are authoritative over docs.'
